cases.setup: config root is /cfg and requested root is /cfg-other or Windows-equivalent sibling prefix
cases.current_source_observation: prefix-only StartsWith comparison can accept the sibling

cases.setup: session name is .., ., whitespace-normalized dot segment, rooted segment or overlong segment
cases.expected: reject unsafe segment; resolved session folder remains a strict descendant of canonical diagnostics root
cases.current_source_observation: invalid-filename-character replacement does not reject dot segments

cases.setup: configured descendant traverses a symlink or junction outside config root
cases.expected: reject or prove final canonical target containment

cases.setup: CSV append succeeds; summary rewrite fails; BepInEx row logging disabled
cases.expected: row count and durable row publish atomically or append is rolled back
cases.current_source_observation: appended row may be uncounted and repeated writes can exceed the intended cap

cases.setup: one row contains very large context, tags, names or observedValue
cases.expected: per-field, per-row and per-session byte caps reject or truncate with explicit marker before write

cases.setup: row contains scene, template GUID/name, display name, tags, context and arbitrary ToString output
cases.expected: field classification and redaction policy produce approved support-safe output
documented retention limit, explicit delete/export action, cache reset and no automatic support publication
support-export path neutralizes spreadsheet formula execution or labels raw CSV unsafe for spreadsheet opening

decision.reason: path containment, traversal, atomicity, byte-bound, redaction and retention requirements are not met
